full_description: An app to track and maintain daily habits, helping users stay organized and focused. It provides a simple and intuitive interface to monitor progress and set reminders. With Habit Tracker, you can easily create and customize your habits, set reminders, and track your progress over time. The app allows you to view your habits in a calendar or list view, making it easy to see what you need to do each day. You can also set goals and milestones, and receive notifications to help you stay on track. Whether you want to start a new exercise routine, read more books, or simply drink more water, Habit Tracker is the perfect tool to help you achieve your goals.
